hero.title: Every moment captured.
hero.description: Thousands of event photos, but only yours appear on your screen. Scan the QR, take a selfie — Phogo does the rest.
hero.subtext: No setup required · Live in 5 minutes · No app download

howItWorks.title: How does Phogo work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Zero setup, zero app, zero registration for your attendees. Just a camera and one tap.

steps.title: Upload Photos
steps.desc: Upload your event photos to the Phogo dashboard. AI silently indexes every face in the background.

steps.title: Share the QR Code
steps.desc: Display the Phogo-generated QR code at your event. Attendees just point their camera at it.

steps.title: Instant Download
steps.desc: Attendees take a selfie and Phogo finds every photo they appear in — within seconds.

advantages.title: Your photographer captured thousands of shots.
advantages.titleHighlight: But how do attendees access them?
advantages.description: Phogo solves this forever. No USB sharing, no WhatsApp chaos, no "who will send the photos?" question. Everyone gets their photos, instantly.
advantages.quote: "The event ending doesn't mean the memories end.
advantages.quoteHighlight: With Phogo, every photo reaches everyone."

items.title: Results in 3 Seconds
items.desc: Phogo uses the same face recognition engine that powers AWS at millions of images. Your photos appear in milliseconds.

items.title: Privacy First
items.desc: Phogo never stores your facial data. Every search is processed instantly and discarded. GDPR compliant, transparent, secure.

items.title: Unlimited Attendees
items.desc: From a 100-person meeting to a 10,000-person festival. Phogo delivers the same quality and speed regardless of scale.

items.title: Ready in 5 Minutes
items.desc: No technical knowledge needed. Log in to Phogo, upload photos, share the QR. That's it.

items.title: Attendee Experience
items.desc: No app download, no registration, no password. Just QR and selfie. Your attendees will love you for it.

items.title: Easy & Fast Download
items.desc: Single photo or all at once. Phogo generates secure download links valid for 24 hours.

contact.title: Try Phogo at your next event
contact.description: Contact us for a free demo. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours and set up your first event together.
features: Free demo for your first event

form.name: Full Name
form.successDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong, please try again.

guest.privacy: Your face data is never stored • Secure & Private
guest.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find any photos of you in this event. Try again from a different angle.
guest.invalidLink: This event link is invalid or has expired
guest.faceGuide: Position your face inside the oval
guest.cameraError: Camera access denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
